content.en:
Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, the first year of the tens of millions of realms has passed.

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, he was refining the last drop of immeasurable blood at the limit, once the complete refining was completed, then his 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood would be completely refined to the upper limit.

He had a hunch that once he refined the last drop of immeasurable blood to the limit of the upper grade, his strength would usher in a skyrocket, just like the last time he refined all the immeasurable bones to the limit.

This is a metamorphosis of the whole body, a qualitative change of the physical body!

Soon, the last drop of immeasurable blood was finally refined to the limit by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

The 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood in his body began to boil, and a blood cocoon wrapped Ye Tian and allowed him to transform in the blood cocoon.

At the same time, the blood cocoon was also absorbing the energy around him, and the energy of the ruins stone tower layer after layer was absorbed by Ye Tian, helping him to transform his physical body.

After a long time, the blood cocoon absorbed enough energy and no longer absorbed the energy of the outside world, and Ye Tian's transformation continued.

Click!!

The blood cocoon cracked, and Ye Tian walked out of it.

At this moment, his aura was much stronger than before.

"The physical body is at least seventy percent stronger than before, and the immeasurable blood has undergone subtle changes, and the speed of recovery is too fast!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He tried to burn a drop of immeasurable blood, and it didn't take long for him to recover.

What this meant, he knew very well, was that he could continuously burn immeasurable blood in battle, and as long as the recovery speed could keep up with the speed of consumption, he could burn immeasurable blood for a long time.

"That's a good ability!"

Ye Tian was quite satisfied.

At his current level, the next step is to impact the fourth stage.

However, he is not fit to challenge for stage 4 right now.

After all, he had just broken through to the peak of the third stage, and his flesh and blood body had not yet completely adapted to stability, and he still needed a certain period of adaptation.

Wait until the adaptation period has passed, and then you can go to the fourth stage, otherwise the success rate will be too low, and even if the forced breakthrough is successful, it will affect the foundation problem, and the future cultivation will not be smooth.

"After the first year of tens of millions of realms, the adaptation period should be over, and then I will go to the fourth stage!"

Ye Tian possessed a large amount of Void Golden Water, and it was not difficult for him to attack the fourth stage.

As long as the time is up, he can become a high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fourth stage.

......

this day.

A hidden Great Ancestor came from outside the Ruins Stone Tower, trying to break into the Ruins Stone Tower, but he didn't break in forcibly, he just used this way to contact Ye Tian.

"It's him!"

Ye Tian recognized the comer at a glance, and it was the Great Ancestor of Blood.

He was a little strange, you must know that the current situation of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor is not very good, and he even dares to come to the Ruins Stone Tower, if it is discovered, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor is afraid that it will be in trouble!

"What did the Blood Ancestor come to me for?"

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment, but still let the Blood Ancestor come in.

The first floor of the stone tower of the ruins.

The Blood Ancestor came in, and Ye Tian also appeared on the first layer.

"Blood Ancestor!"

"Endless Ancestor!"

Ye Tian and the Raccoon Blood Ancestor greeted each other.

At this time, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor exclaimed: "Endless Ancestor, my growth rate has stunned me, when you cut off the Black Mountain meeting, you were still very weak, and your combat strength was not as good as the weakest third stage. Unexpectedly, now, it is enough to rival the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage!"

"Blood Ancestor, what are you looking for me, if it's old, then please leave!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Although he knew the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, the relationship between the two was average, and after the release of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, they no longer had any contractual constraints.

Moreover, he also did not agree with the behavior of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and his reputation in the Xuanqi Territory was also very bad, moody, and offended many forces and strong people.

Therefore, he was reluctant to make friends with the Bloody Great Ancestor.

The Bloody Great Ancestor hurriedly said, "Endless Great Ancestor, I'm here to cooperate with you!"

"Cooperation?"

Ye Tian frowned and said, "What do I have to cooperate with you?"

The Bloody Great Ancestor said, "Endless Great Ancestor, what I am cooperating with is the resources of the fourth stage of cultivation. Although the Ruined Stone Tower is a relic, the resources inside the Ruined Stone Tower are all the resources that the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss and the Divine Armor Realm once had, and the resources of the fourth stage are almost not much, or even if they are, they are of little use. For example, the most suitable resource for the fourth stage of cultivation is the immeasurable blood gold stone, which cannot be possessed inside the ruin stone tower!"

Ye Tian frowned, there was indeed no Endless Blood Gold Stone inside the Ruins Stone Tower.

At this time, the Bloody Great Ancestor said: "Don't say it's you, even if it's a force like Tongshan City, there is no way to obtain the immeasurable blood gold stone, and a force like Xuanqi Pavilion will not trade it." In the entire Xuanqi Territory, it is almost impossible to find the Infinite Blood Gold Stone. Almost all of these resources were controlled by top powers such as the Nine Yang Sea, the Outer Alliance, and the Xuanqi Pavilion. Without such a treasure as the Infinite Blood Gold Stone, the cultivation speed of the cultivators of the fourth stage almost stagnated. Like the Junshan Great Ancestor who was almost killed by you, it has been too long to become a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and before I was sealed, Junshan Great Ancestor was already a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform. He was a very old fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform in the Xuanqi Realm, but due to the lack of resources, there was almost no change in the increase in strength. It is precisely because there has been no progress in the slightest for countless years that Junshan Great Ancestor ventured to attack the Ruined Stone Tower, hoping to find some good things in your Ruined Stone Tower to improve his strength. "

"Could it be that the content of your cooperation with me has something to do with the immeasurable blood gold stone?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"It matters!" "The Blood Ancestor said, "The Infinite Blood Golden Stone is a resource that will only be born in the place where the Infinite Realm Beast fell, and after a long period of gestation, it will give birth to the Infinite Blood Golden Stone. And it is impossible for the Infinite Realm Beasts to fall into the Xuanqi Realm, and they will not enter the Xuanqi Realm. "

"Immeasurable Beasts?"

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of this name, so he was a little curious and confused.

The Blood Ancestor introduced: "The Infinite Realm Beast is a creature that wanders in the Infinite Realm Ruins, the Infinite Realm Ruins is a mysterious area between the Xuanqi Realm, the Silent Black Sea, and the Divine Armor Realm, and the birth of the intersection period is that the Infinite Realm Ruins have undergone some kind of change, which will make the two realms meet. Under normal circumstances, even the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms would not be able to enter the Immeasurable Realm Ruins, and the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms would not dare to step into the Immeasurable Realm Ruins. And the strength of the Immeasurable Realm Beast is very strong, and it can rival the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage when it is an adult. However, the Infinite Beasts would kill each other, so the fallen Infinite Beasts still existed. And I know the place where an immeasurable beast fell, and now the place where the immeasurable beast fell should have given birth to the immeasurable blood gold stone. However, I am not strong enough, so I want to invite you to go. "

"I'll think about it!"

Ye Tian said.
